message: feat: add install/uninstall Makefile targets and README

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+.PHONY: install uninstall
+
+install: ## Install the cxdb-observability Claude Code plugin
+	@node -e " \
+	  const fs = require('fs'); \
+	  const p = require('os').homedir() + '/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'; \
+	  let data = {}; \
+	  try { data = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p, 'utf8')); } catch(e) {} \
+	  data.plugins = data.plugins || {}; \
+	  const key = 'cxdb-observability@local'; \
+	  data.plugins[key] = [{ \
+	    scope: 'user', \
+	    installPath: '$(CURDIR)', \
+	    version: '1.0.0', \
+	    installedAt: new Date().toISOString(), \
+	    lastUpdated: new Date().toISOString() \
+	  }]; \
+	  fs.mkdirSync(require('path').dirname(p), {recursive: true}); \
+	  fs.writeFileSync(p, JSON.stringify(data, null, 2) + '\n'); \
+	  console.log('Installed: ' + key); \
+	  console.log('Path: $(CURDIR)'); \
+	"
+
+uninstall: ## Remove the cxdb-observability Claude Code plugin
+	@node -e " \
+	  const fs = require('fs'); \
+	  const p = require('os').homedir() + '/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'; \
+	  let data = {}; \
+	  try { data = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p, 'utf8')); } catch(e) {} \
+	  data.plugins = data.plugins || {}; \
+	  delete data.plugins['cxdb-observability@local']; \
+	  fs.writeFileSync(p, JSON.stringify(data, null, 2) + '\n'); \
+	  console.log('Uninstalled: cxdb-observability@local'); \
+	"

@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+# cxdb-observability Plugin
+
+Records every Claude Code session as structured `cxdb.ConversationItem` turns in [cxdb](https://github.com/strongdm/cxdb), enabling full trajectory browsing in the cxdb UI.
+
+## Requirements
+
+- bash, curl, jq, python3 (all standard on macOS)
+- cxdb running locally or on Tailscale (see [cxdb repo](../cxdb))
+
+## Quick Start
+
+### 1. Start cxdb locally
+
+In the cxdb repo:
+
+```bash
+make dev-docker-up
+```
+
+Starts cxdb in Docker. Frontend: http://localhost:3000 | API: http://localhost:9010
+
+### 2. Install the plugin
+
+```bash
+make install
+```
+
+### 3. Start a new Claude Code session
+
+Sessions started **after** installation will be recorded automatically. Existing sessions are not affected.
+
+### 4. View trajectories
+
+Open http://localhost:3000 in your browser. Sessions appear as contexts with full turn history.
+
+## How It Works
+
+Seven Claude Code hooks (bash + curl + jq) fire at session lifecycle events:
+
+| Hook | cxdb Type | Notes |
+|---|---|---|
+| `SessionStart` | `system` (info) | Creates context, registers type bundle, writes ContextMetadata with Provenance |
+| `UserPromptSubmit` | `user_input` | Async |
+| `PostToolUse` | *(buffered)* | Async — no cxdb write yet |
+| `Stop` | `assistant_turn` | Flushes buffered tool calls + parses transcript for text/metrics |
+| `SubagentStop` | `handoff` | Records agent-to-agent handoffs |
+| `PreCompact` | `system` (warning) | Async |
+| `Notification` | `system` (info) | Async |
+
+All cxdb writes are fire-and-forget — if cxdb is down, your session continues normally.
+
+## Configuration
+
+### Pointing at a different cxdb instance
+
+To use a shared team cxdb instance instead of localhost, create `~/.claude/cxdb-observability.local.md`:
+
+```
+url: http://cxdb.your-tailnet.ts.net:9010
+```
+
+Or set the `CXDB_URL` environment variable.
+
+**URL priority:**
+1. `$CXDB_URL` environment variable
+2. `url:` field in `~/.claude/cxdb-observability.local.md`
+3. `http://localhost:9010` (default)
+
+## Uninstall
+
+```bash
+make uninstall
+```
